tools.name: generateQuote
tools.description: Create a transparent, deterministic service-business estimate using configured pricing rules.

tools.name: generateQuoteWidget
tools.description: App-only quote generation used by the QuoteCraft AI widget.

tools.name: explainQuote
tools.description: Explain exactly how a quote was calculated and which assumptions were used.

tools.name: explainQuoteWidget
tools.description: App-only quote explanation used by the QuoteCraft AI widget.

tools.name: regenerateQuote

tools.description: App-only quote recalculation used by the QuoteCraft AI widget.
